temples.name: BAPS Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Shahibaug
temples.description: A prominent BAPS Swaminarayan mandir in Ahmedabad, listed by Akshardham's official contact page among its Gujarat mandirs.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Ambaji Temple
temples.location: Ambaji, Danta Taluka, Banaskantha District, Gujarat
temples.description: A major Shakti Peetha at Arasur near the Gujarat-Rajasthan border. The temple worships the sacred Shree Visa Yantra rather than an anthropomorphic idol.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Dwarkadhish Temple
temples.description: The main Krishna temple at Dwarka, also known as Jagat Mandir. It stands near Gomti creek and is one of Gujarat's most important pilgrimage sites.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Nageshwar Jyotirlinga
temples.location: Near Dwarka, Devbhumi Dwarka District, Gujarat
temples.description: A revered Shiva shrine near Dwarka, identified by Gujarat Tourism as one of India's twelve Jyotirlingas.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Swaminarayan Akshardham, Gandhinagar
temples.description: The first Swaminarayan Akshardham campus, located in Gujarat's capital city and maintained by BAPS.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Somnath Temple
temples.description: A major Shiva temple on the Saurashtra coast, traditionally revered as the first among the twelve Jyotirlinga shrines. The present temple was reconstructed in Chalukya style and completed in 1951.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Ranchhodrai Dakor Temple
temples.description: A popular Krishna temple at Dakor, described by Kheda district administration as a major temple of central Gujarat.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Sun Temple, Modhera
temples.description: A celebrated Solanki-era Sun temple at Modhera, known for its carved temple complex and stepped tank.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.
